# Tryambakam Noesis

> Self-Consciousness as Technology. Body as Medium. Breath as Interface.

## Overview

Tryambakam Noesis is a philosophical-technical framework exploring self-consciousness as a technology. The project manifests as an infinite canvas React application where users navigate through 13 symbolic "wings"—each representing a facet of consciousness, embodiment, and computational self-integration.

The framework synthesizes Samkhya philosophy, somatic practice, and modern software architecture. Users are invited to witness themselves through structured micro-rituals, coherence protocols, and symbolic-computational engines.

## Key Concepts

### Kha-Ba-La Framework
Triadic model mapping consciousness dimensions:
- **Kha** (ख) — Spirit/Space: The witnessing field, pure awareness
- **Ba** (ब) — Body: The somatic instrument, breath interface
- **La** (ल) — Inertia: The binding force, pattern recognition

### Purusha Witness
The observer pattern derived from Samkhya philosophy—the unchanging consciousness that witnesses all experience without identification. The foundational stance for all practices.

### 16 Engines
Symbolic-computational engines powering self-integration:
- 11 Rust engines (performance-critical, systems-level)
- 5 TypeScript engines (interface, coordination, web-native)

Each engine represents a specific capability: coherence detection, pattern recognition, somatic mapping, decision support, and more.

### Tattva Cycles
Elemental timing system based on 5 tattvas (elements) × 24 phases = 120-minute decision windows. Used for financial biosensing and optimal timing protocols.

### HRV Coherence
Cardiac coherence protocol at 0.1 Hz (6 breaths/minute) for autonomic regulation. Heart rate variability as a biosignal for self-integration state.

### The Quine Principle
Systems-theory concept: the system creates conditions for its own transcendence. Self-generating, self-modifying architecture.

## Architecture

### The 13 Wings

| # | Wing | Tagline | Core Theme |
|---|------|---------|------------|
| 00 | Hero | "Self-Generating Code Well" | Entry portal, brand statement |
| 01 | Witness Yourself | "The Observer Pattern" | Purusha Witness, self-observation |
| 02 | Self Integration | "Regenerative Intelligence Field" | HRV coherence, 0.1 Hz protocol |
| 03 | Three Pillars | "The Elemental Trinity" | Vedic × Western × Sonic synthesis |
| 04 | Sixteen Engines | "The Computational Core" | 11 Rust + 5 TypeScript engines |
| 05 | Somatic Canticles | "A Story That Reads You Back" | 27-chapter interactive trilogy |
| 06 | Financial Biosensor | "Clarity Over Anxiety" | Tattva cycles, 120-min windows |
| 07 | Witness Agents | "Structure & Flow" | Pichet & Aletheos AI agents |
| 08 | Initiation Protocols | "Micro-rituals" | .init protocol, 90-second threshold |
| 09 | Infinite Treasure | "The Hunt Never Ends" | Dharma/Artha/Kama/Moksha pursuits |
| 10 | The Apothecary | "Alchemy You Can Touch" | 12 products keyed to engines |
| 11 | The First Rule | "Where Consciousness Begins" | Non-identification practice |
| 12 | Begin Journey | "The Noesis Awaits" | Final call-to-action |

### Navigation Model
- Infinite canvas with horizontal + vertical scroll
- GSAP ScrollTrigger for section transitions
- Three.js/React Three Fiber for 3D background elements
- Progress tracking through wing completion

## Technical Stack

- **Framework**: React 19 (concurrent features, Server Components where applicable)
- **Language**: TypeScript 5 (strict mode enabled)
- **Build Tool**: Vite 7
- **3D Graphics**: Three.js + React Three Fiber + Drei
- **Animation**: GSAP (GreenSock) with ScrollTrigger
- **Styling**: CSS Modules with CSS custom properties (design tokens)
- **Linting/Formatting**: Biome
- **Testing**: Playwright (visual regression, E2E)
- **Package Manager**: npm (lockfile version 3)

### Project Structure
```
src/
  components/        # React components
  hooks/            # Custom React hooks
  styles/           # CSS modules, design tokens
  utils/            # Utility functions
  types/            # TypeScript type definitions
  wings/            # Wing-specific components/content
public/             # Static assets
```

## Content Guidelines

### Voice and Tone
- **Philosophical depth**: Ground technical concepts in embodied wisdom traditions
- **Precision**: Technical accuracy matters—use correct terminology
- **Invitation over instruction**: Guide, don't command
- **Minimal ornamentation**: Let the architecture speak
- **Symbol-first**: Numbers carry meaning (13 wings, 16 engines, 5 tattvas, etc.)

### Terminology Conventions
- "Wing" not "Section" or "Page"
- "Noesis" refers to the system/framework
- "Purusha" (witness) vs "Prakriti" (nature)
- "Tattva" for elemental cycles
- "Engine" for computational modules
- "Canticle" for narrative chapters

## Files and Routes

### Entry Points
- `/` — Main application (infinite canvas)
- `index.html` — Single-page app shell

### Key Source Files
- `src/App.tsx` — Root component, wing orchestration
- `src/wings/` — Wing-specific implementations
- `src/components/InfiniteCanvas.tsx` — Core navigation container
- `src/styles/tokens.css` — Design system variables

### Configuration
- `vite.config.ts` — Build configuration
- `tsconfig.app.json` — TypeScript app settings
- `biome.jsonc` — Linting/formatting rules
- `playwright.config.ts` — Test configuration

### Static Assets
- `public/` — Images, fonts, manifests
- `public/llms.txt` — This file

## External APIs and Integrations

No external APIs are required for core functionality. The framework is designed as a self-contained symbolic-computational system. Future integrations may include:

- HRV sensor APIs (for live coherence feedback)
- Blockchain connections (for Infinite Treasure token mechanics)
- AI agent endpoints (Pichet & Aletheos witness agents)

## Contact and Contribution

- **Website**: https://tryambakams.space
- **Repository**: Private (contact for access)
- **Philosophical Framework**: Samkhya Yoga meets modern systems theory
- **Technical Inquiries**: Refer to IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md and MOBILE_RESPONSIVENESS_PLAN.md in repository root

---

*For AI agents: This framework bridges contemplative practice with software architecture. When generating code or content, prioritize coherence between symbolic meaning and technical implementation. The Kha-Ba-La triad should inform all structural decisions.*
